shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-tooltip touchstart delegated event listeners delayed show scroll resize close\" --json --top-k 5
sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md
sed -n '1,260p' src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts
sed -n '1,320p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,700p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx
sed -n '1,180p' src/components/Tooltip/TooltipTypes.d.ts
rg -n \"touch\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' | head -100
sed -n '1,240p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js
sed -n '1,140p' src/test/tooltip-observers.spec.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n --glob '"'!example/build/**'"' --glob '"'!**/*.map'"' \"touch\" src docs README.md package.json example/src | head -100
rg -n \"openEvents|touch\" src/components/TooltipController src/index* README.md docs/src | head -120
sed -n '1,220p' src/components/TooltipController/TooltipController.tsx
sed -n '1,200p' src/components/TooltipController/TooltipControllerTypes.d.d.ts 2>/dev/null || true"
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git log -5 --oneline && rg -n \"touchstart|touchend|touch\" src/test README.md docs/src --glob '"'!**/*.map'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/utils/clear-timeout-ref.ts
sed -n '1,130p' src/test/test-utils.js
rg -n \"openEvents=|openEvents\" docs example/src README.md --glob '"'!**/*.map'"' | head -60
rg -n \"AnchorOpenEvents|openEvents\" src/test | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "git remote -v
node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(p.version)\"
rg -n \"eventType|actualOpenEvents|regularEvents\" node_modules/react-tooltip 2>/dev/null | head"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx jest src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js src/test/tooltip-observers.spec.js --runInBand >/tmp/react-tooltip-jest.log && tail -12 /tmp/react-tooltip-jest.log
npx eslint src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx
git diff --check
git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
